title: repixeled font
description: a nice cubic vanilla+ font for minecraft style enthusiasts!
body:
a nice cubic vanilla+ font for minecraft style enthusiasts!

[check out repixel!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/repixel)

known issues: the pack shows you currently the "broken or incompatible warning". its completlely fine and shouldnt cause problems its just because i coudnt get the mcmeta file to display the right version.

stand with israel!
